releases.title: Crimson Legacy
releases.coverImage: assets/images/Callizto Dark Symphony - Crimson Legacy (2026 Version).jpg
releases.localAudio: assets/Audio/Callizto Dark Symphony - Crimson Legacy (2026 New version).mp3
releases.description: Part I of the Crimson Legacy trilogy. The 2026 audio version is the preferred current song version, while the original legacy version is preserved as the version used in the existing music video.

releases.title: Iron Queen
releases.description: Part II of the Crimson Legacy trilogy. A heavy chapter of command, endurance, and the cost of wearing a crown made from conflict.

releases.title: Throne of Ash and Gold
releases.coverImage: assets/images/Callizto Dark Symphony - Throne of Ash and Gold.png
releases.imageAlt: Throne of Ash and Gold cover art
releases.localAudio: assets/Audio/Callizto Dark Symphony - Throne of Ashen Gold.mp3
releases.description: Final chapter of the Crimson Legacy trilogy. A cinematic metal piece about beauty after ruin, inheritance after fire, and the unstable shine of victory.

releases.title: We Are Warriors
releases.coverImage: assets/images/Callizto Dark Symphony - We Are Warriors (BQ).jpg
releases.localAudio: assets/Audio/Callizto Dark Symphony - We Are Warriors (128kbit_AAC).m4a
releases.description: A major CDS anthem of survival, unity, and defiance.

releases.title: We Are Warriors AR
releases.coverImage: assets/images/Callizto Dark Symphony - We are Warriors AR (BQ).jpg
releases.imageAlt: We Are Warriors AR cover art
releases.localAudio: assets/Audio/Callizto Dark Symphony - We are Warriors AR (128kbit_AAC).m4a
releases.description: Alternate Reality archive version connected to one of the emotional core milestones of Callizto Dark Symphony.

releases.title: Heart of the Static

releases.imageAlt: Heart of the Static cover art
releases.localAudio: assets/Audio/Callizto Dark Symphony - Heart of the Static (128kbit_AAC).m4a
releases.description: A cyber-goth signal entry tied to the static, the Forge, and the human pulse inside machine noise.
